calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok and M. Grier. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioners father Richao Yang and mother Jian Jun Guo of minor present in court.

Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name Fangwei Yang to new name Leanna Yang.
Decree Changing Name signed by the court.
